notableEvents.label: Throwing error
notableEvents.detail: Brice Turang singles on a ground ball to shortstop Willy Adames. Jackson Chourio to 3rd. Jackson Chourio advances to 3rd, on a throwing error by shortstop Willy Adames.

notableEvents.label: Eric Haase grand slam
notableEvents.detail: Eric Haase hits a grand slam (4) to center field. Jung Hoo Lee scores. Bryce Eldridge scores. Matt Chapman scores.

notableEvents.label: Andrew Vaughn pinch-hit
notableEvents.detail: Andrew Vaughn grounds into a force out, shortstop Willy Adames to second baseman Luis Arraez. Jake Bauers out at 2nd.

notableEvents.label: Joey Ortiz pinch-hit
notableEvents.detail: Joey Ortiz lines out to shortstop Willy Adames.

notableEvents.label: Andrew Vaughn pinch-hit
notableEvents.detail: Andrew Vaughn flies out sharply to center fielder Drew Gilbert.

notableEvents.label: Gary Sánchez pinch-hit
